name: Xi'an Catering Co., Ltd.
summary: Xi'an Catering Co., Ltd. operates and manages restaurants and hotels. The company operates regular chain restaurants, hotels, dumpling restaurants, roast duck restaurants, and others, which provide catering services, food delivery services, and room services. It is also involved in the provision of cooking art training services; and hot spring recuperation and enterprise investment consulting businesses. The company operates 15 branches and 50 regular chain shops in Xi'an, Shaanxi province. Xi'an Catering Co., Ltd. is based in Xi'an, China.
